products.name: Rev Winner Core Platform
products.description: AI-powered sales assistant for real-time conversation intelligence and coaching
painPoints: sales reps struggle with discovery calls

upsellBundles.name: Sales Excellence Bundle
upsellBundles.valueProposition: Complete sales transformation with AI coaching, custom training, and performance analytics

crossSellOpportunities.pitch: Your team would benefit from our Custom AI Training feature - it learns from your best sales calls and product documentation
For team-wide insights, our Advanced Analytics add-on provides manager dashboards with win/loss analysis and rep benchmarking

strengths: Only platform with sub-3-second real-time AI coaching
Hybrid sales methodology framework (SPIN, MEDDIC, Challenger, BANT, NLP, GAP)
battleCard.vsGong: Rev Winner offers real-time coaching during calls, while Gong focuses on post-call analysis. We're also 70% more affordable.
battleCard.vsChorus: Unlike Chorus, we support 6 AI providers and work domain-agnostic across any industry.
battleCard.vsAvoma: Rev Winner's hybrid methodology framework provides deeper sales coaching than Avoma's basic transcription.

products.name: Custom AI Training (Train Me Add-On)
products.description: Upload your sales playbooks, product docs, and winning calls to create a personalized AI coach
painPoints: generic AI responses don't match our product
need AI to understand our specific solutions
want AI trained on our best sales calls
AI doesn't know our competitive positioning

upsellBundles.name: Elite Sales Team Package
upsellBundles.valueProposition: Full-stack sales intelligence with custom AI, analytics, and dedicated support

crossSellOpportunities.pitch: Once your AI is trained, our Analytics add-on shows which messaging drives the highest win rates

strengths: Multi-format support (PDF, DOC, PPT, Excel, URLs)
Priority AI context - your docs referenced first
OCR for images and scanned documents
weaknesses: Requires time to upload and organize documents
battleCard.vsGong: Gong charges per seat for knowledge integration. Rev Winner's Train Me is a one-time add-on for unlimited uploads.
battleCard.differentiators: Your sales playbooks become the AI's primary knowledge source - no generic responses

products.name: Advanced Analytics Dashboard
products.description: Team-wide insights, win/loss analysis, rep benchmarking, and conversation intelligence metrics

upsellBundles.name: Manager Excellence Suite
upsellBundles.valueProposition: Complete sales leadership platform with team analytics and premium AI support

crossSellOpportunities.pitch: For managing multiple reps, our Analytics Dashboard gives you team-wide visibility and performance trends

battleCard.vsGong: Rev Winner Analytics is an add-on, not a separate expensive platform. We're 60% more affordable than Gong for analytics features.
battleCard.vsClari: Unlike Clari's complex setup, Rev Winner Analytics integrates automatically with your existing conversations - zero configuration.

products.name: Dedicated AI Infrastructure (Premium DAI)
products.description: Dedicated AI processing, priority queues, SLA guarantees, and premium support
painPoints: concerned about AI response times during peak hours
need guaranteed SLA for enterprise compliance
want priority processing for critical deals

upsellBundles.name: Enterprise Command Center
upsellBundles.valueProposition: Complete enterprise-grade sales intelligence with dedicated infrastructure and premium support

crossSellOpportunities.trigger: mention of large team or enterprise deployment
crossSellOpportunities.pitch: For enterprise scale, our Premium DAI ensures sub-2-second response times even with 100+ concurrent users, backed by 99.9% uptime SLA

strengths: Dedicated account manager and support team
battleCard.vsCompetitors: Unlike Salesforce Einstein's rigid infrastructure, Rev Winner DAI is flexible and customizable to your exact needs
battleCard.differentiators: Only sales intelligence platform offering dedicated AI infrastructure at this price point

products.name: Session Minutes Add-Ons
products.description: Additional conversation minutes for power users and high-volume sales teams

crossSellOpportunities.trigger: user mentions running low on minutes
crossSellOpportunities.pitch: Based on your usage pattern, the 1800-minute package would give you 3x more capacity for just $25/month

commonBundles.name: Starter Pack
commonBundles.pitch: Get started with Core Platform plus extra minutes for heavy usage

commonBundles.name: Professional Suite
commonBundles.pitch: Core Platform + Custom AI Training + Extra Minutes - everything you need for advanced selling

commonBundles.name: Team Leader Bundle
commonBundles.pitch: Perfect for sales managers - Core Platform + Team Analytics + High-Volume Minutes

commonBundles.name: Enterprise Package
commonBundles.pitch: Complete enterprise solution - Custom AI, Team Analytics, Dedicated Infrastructure

multiProductScenarios.scenario: New customer with small team (2-5 reps)
multiProductScenarios.reasoning: Start with core platform and basic extra capacity

multiProductScenarios.scenario: Customer mentions training needs or specific products
multiProductScenarios.reasoning: Custom AI training ensures product-specific responses

multiProductScenarios.scenario: Sales manager or team lead buyer
multiProductScenarios.reasoning: Managers need team visibility and capacity for multiple reps

multiProductScenarios.scenario: Enterprise with 20+ users or security/SLA requirements
multiProductScenarios.reasoning: Full enterprise stack with dedicated infrastructure

multiProductScenarios.scenario: Customer running low on minutes mid-call
multiProductScenarios.reasoning: Immediate capacity need - upsell minutes package
Position against enterprise competitors with analytics capabilities
